title: Sharing managed Iceberg tables in Delta Sharing is in Public Preview
body: You can now use Delta Sharing to share managed Iceberg tables in Databricks-to-Databricks sharing and open sharing. See [Add managed Iceberg tables to a share](/aws/en/opensharing/create-share#managed-iceberg) and [Read shared managed Iceberg tables](/aws/en/opensharing/read-data-databricks#managed-iceberg).

ref_links.text: Add managed Iceberg tables to a share
